title: Inspect schema drift without mutating live state
goal: Review a schema file against the live backend and explain whether the proposed changes are safe.
assumptions: Agents will prefer diff and dry-run define over direct mutation.
The explicit plan shape helps models reason about destructive risk.
prompt: You have been given a proposed schema file. Check drift against live state, then determine whether any changes look destructive. Do not apply the plan.
success_checks: Drift is inspected with diff or dry-run define
The answer distinguishes safe versus destructive actions
failure_modes: Misses destructive actions in the plan
Explains the change without consulting live state
